entities.name: Port Valor
entities.description: A bustling harbor city on Valor Bay known for shipyards and trade.

entities.name: The Crooked Tavern
entities.description: A weathered tavern favored by sailors and dockhands.

entities.name: Valor Bay
entities.description: A broad bay with treacherous fogs in early autumn.

entities.name: Aldric
entities.description: A middle-aged tavern keeper who runs the Crooked Tavern.
entities.childhood_backstory: Born to a fisherman's family in Port Valor. Spent youth learning the docks and the people who sailed them. Lost his father to a storm at sea when he was twelve.
entities.adult_backstory: Inherited the Crooked Tavern from his uncle at 25. Has run it for twenty years, making it a hub for sailors, merchants, and adventurers. Has heard countless stories and seen the rise and fall of fortunes.

entities.name: Rowan
entities.description: Aldric's uncle who previously owned the Crooked Tavern.
entities.childhood_backstory: Raised near the docks of Port Valor and learned the tavern trade young.
entities.adult_backstory: Owned the Crooked Tavern before Aldric and passed it on when he retired.

entities.name: Mira
entities.description: A healer who runs a small apothecary in Port Valor.
entities.childhood_backstory: Grew up in Port Valor and apprenticed under a traveling herbalist.
entities.adult_backstory: Opened a small apothecary near the east quay and treats dock fever cases.

entities.name: Dawnwatch Lighthouse
entities.description: A lighthouse tower on the outer rocks of Valor Bay.

entities.name: Ironwatch
entities.description: The official guard force of Port Valor.

entities.name: Captain Voss
entities.description: Commander of the Ironwatch garrison in Port Valor.
entities.childhood_backstory: Raised in Grayfall and enlisted in the Ironwatch as a teenager.
entities.adult_backstory: Rose through the ranks to command the Ironwatch garrison in Port Valor.

entities.name: Lantern Guild
entities.description: A guild that maintains lighthouses around Valor Bay.

entities.name: Whisper Market
entities.description: A night bazaar hidden beneath the old docks.

entities.name: Blackkeel
entities.description: A merchant sloop that vanished during the Storm of Years.

entities.name: Salt Road
entities.description: A trade road connecting Port Valor to inland Grayfall.

entities.name: Grayfall
entities.description: An inland town known for its salt mines.
